text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 版本 每Lane带宽 x16总带宽 编码

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: Gen 3 8 GT/s ~16 GB/s 128b/130b

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: Gen 4 16 GT/s ~32 GB/s 128b/130b

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: Gen 5 32 GT/s ~64 GB/s 128b/130b

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: Gen 6 64 GT/s ~128 GB/s 242b/256b
PCIe (Peripheral Component Interconnect Express):

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: GPU 通过 PCIe 插槽连接到 CPU (除了 NVLink 直连的场景)。
物理层:
PCIe 使用差分串行信号 (Differential Signaling):

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 每个 Lane 有 2 对线 (TX差分对 + RX差分对)

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: x16 = 16 个 Lane 并行
PCIe 代际:

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: GT/s = GigaTransfers per second
128b/130b 编码: 每 130 bit 中有 128 bit 是有效数据 (编码开销 ~1.5%)
BAR (Base Address Register):
GPU 通过 PCIe BAR 向 CPU 暴露一段地址空间:
BAR0: GPU 寄存器 (控制寄存器, Doorbell 等) → MMIO 访问
BAR1: GPU 显存的一个窗口 → CPU 可以直接读写 GPU 显存

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: (很慢, 走 PCIe → 通常只用于小量数据或调试)
MMIO (Memory-Mapped IO):

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: CPU 写 GPU 的某个地址 = 写 GPU 的控制寄存器
例如: CPU 写 Doorbell Register → 通知 GPU 有新命令

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 这就是 kernel launch 时 CPU 通知 GPU 的机制。
DMA (Direct Memory Access):
数据传输不经过 CPU:
cudaMemcpy(H2D): GPU 的 DMA Engine 从 CPU 内存读, 写入 GPU 显存
cudaMemcpy(D2H): GPU 的 DMA Engine 从 GPU 显存读, 写入 CPU 内存
GPU 通常有 2 个独立的 DMA Engine (Copy Engine):
CE0: Host → Device (H2D 方向)
CE1: Device → Host (D2H 方向)

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 它们可以和 Compute Engine 同时工作 → 传输和计算重叠
